# Release variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| **`Release.ReleaseId`** | The identifier of the current release record. |
| **`Release.EnvironmentName`** | The name of stage to which deployment is currently in progress. |
| **`System.ArtifactsDirectory`** | The directory to which artifacts are downloaded during deployment. |
| **`System.AccessToken`** | Special variable carrying the security token used by the running build. |
